Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class DiscoveryGoal

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.DiscoveryGoal
public class DiscoveryGoal extends Metadata

Java class for DiscoveryGoal complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="DiscoveryGoal">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="active" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="deployedModels" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}DiscoveryDeployedModel" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="label" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="modelCards" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}DiscoveryModelCard" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="outcome" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}DiscoveryGoalOutcome"/>
         <element name="predictionType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}DiscoveryPredictionType"/>
         <element name="pushbackField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="pushbackType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}DiscoveryPushbackType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="subscribedEntity" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="terminalStateFilters" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}DiscoveryFilter" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

  • Method Details

    • isActive

      public boolean isActive()
      Gets the value of the active property.

    • setActive

      public void setActive(boolean value)
      Sets the value of the active property.

    • getDeployedModels

      public List<DiscoveryDeployedModel> getDeployedModels()
      Gets the value of the deployedModels property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the deployedModels property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getDeployedModels().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list DiscoveryDeployedModel

      Returns:
      The value of the deployedModels property.

    • getLabel

      public String getLabel()
      Gets the value of the label property.
      Returns:
      possible object is String

    • setLabel

      public void setLabel(String value)
      Sets the value of the label property.
      Parameters:
      value - allowed object is String

    • getModelCards

      public List<DiscoveryModelCard> getModelCards()
      Gets the value of the modelCards property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the modelCards property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getModelCards().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list DiscoveryModelCard

      Returns:
      The value of the modelCards property.

    • getTerminalStateFilters

      public List<DiscoveryFilter> getTerminalStateFilters()
      Gets the value of the terminalStateFilters property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the terminalStateFilters property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getTerminalStateFilters().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list DiscoveryFilter

      Returns:
      The value of the terminalStateFilters property.
